dogfoodObservations.description: Shell working directory resets to worktree root between Bash calls — had to use explicit bash -c 'cd ...' pattern for gh commands in agent-guard subdir.
PR #1153 was already merged (03:38Z) before this EM cycle ran (06:30Z) — state.json had stale ciStatus:'pending-post-rebase'. EM cycle detected merge via GitHub API and updated state correctly.
